summary: reserve must abort with a clear error when config load or credential resolution fails, never silently continue with skipped profile defaults or unauthenticated booking.
reason: A malformed config file or a failing --username-command/--password-command previously had its error discarded, so saved-profile defaults were dropped and a real booking could proceed unauthenticated when credential resolution was requested. A missing config file still yields an empty File and stays OK.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test ./... pass; reserve with a corrupt --config errors on 'load config', and --submit with a failing --password-command errors on 'resolve credentials' without hitting the network.
